svg.title: job-search-agent demo — multi-scene animated walkthrough
svg.desc: A 60-second, seven-scene animated walkthrough of the job-search-agent project for user Jane Doe. Scene 1 introduces the project wordmark and tagline. Scene 2 shows a terminal booting the jobscout script. Scene 3 shows a dashboard scanning 1,200 roles across six public AI companies (Anthropic, Modal, Replit, Cohere, Cursor, Stripe). Scene 4 shows a filter pipeline reducing 6,006 roles to 47. Scene 5 shows the scoring engine ranking three top roles (Modal Labs FDE-ML 9.2, Anthropic Solutions Architect 8.9, Replit Senior PM 8.6). Scene 6 reveals the top-match card for Modal Labs. Scene 7 is the call to action with the project logo and repo URL. Animation loops every 60 seconds.

g.text: wake up to the right roles
jobscout v0.4.0 · searching 6 companies for Jane Doe
Ashby · Greenhouse · Lever — public APIs, no auth
Drop everything that isn't a real fit
Modal Labs · Forward Deployed Engineer, ML
embed with enterprise customers, port their
training and inference pipelines onto Modal's
serverless GPU fabric, then write the playbook
that lets the field team repeat the win.
• Already running Modal in side-project pipeline
Wake up to the right roles.
MIT licensed · runs locally · no cloud dependencies
